name: Uffizzi
description: Open-source ephemeral environment platform with virtual cluster support and Docker Compose-based preview deployments.

seo.title: Uffizzi — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Uffizzi: Open-source ephemeral environment platform with virtual cluster support and Docker Compose-based preview deployments.

when_to_use: Ephemeral preview environments per pull request
Virtual Kubernetes clusters for isolated PR previews
Docker Compose-based staging environments on demand
Open-source alternative to Namespace.so for previews

pros: Ephemeral full-stack previews from Docker Compose
Virtual cluster model shares infra efficiently
Good GitHub integration for PR-based workflows
cons: Smaller community than Release or Vercel
review.verdict: A clever Compose-driven preview platform, but evaluate project momentum before committing.
review.best_for: Dev teams wanting OSS per-PR full-stack previews without enterprise vendor lock-in.
review.not_for: Teams needing a vendor with strong momentum and enterprise support.
